help.templateUnicode: [[unicode]] is the Unicode scalar value like u4e00
help.templateIDS: [[IDS]] is the IDS (Ideographic Description Sequence) like ⿰口土
help.templateGlyphWiki: [[GlyphWikiPNG]] is the PNG image URL from GlyphWiki. [[GlyphWikiSVG]] gives the SVG URL.

manual.title: Manual
manual.searchDesc: Enter CJK components and remaining stroke count in the search box. Example: '口土3' searches for characters containing 口 and 土 with 3 remaining strokes.
manual.decomposeDesc: Enter a character and click 'Decompose' to break it into IDS components and fill the search box.
manual.ivsDesc: If a card shows an 'IVS' link, click it to select variant glyphs for that character.
manual.pasteDesc: Choose from 3 copy formats: Character (the raw character), Unicode scalar (U+XXXX format), or XML template (customizable).
